programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Dee takes care of her mother while dealing with her busy clinic; emergency surgery on a Yorkie puppy; puppies are rescued from remote villages in the hopes of finding them homes.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: A local radio station helps Dr. Dee find a forever home for a special needs dog; cattle turns hostile during castration; Dr. Dee examines a recently awakened black bear.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Dee leads a marathon spay and neuter clinic at a laundromat in Ruby, Alaska; Dr. Dee struggles to deliver a calf at one of the largest cattle ranches in the state.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff returns from a free vet care clinic with a dog who was hit by a car; the owner of a kitten with suspected ringworm gets more than she bargained for; Dr. Jeff treats a family dog with a mysterious lump; Dr. Baier falls for a rescued puppy.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team head to a remote town to provide low-cost pet care; Dr. Petra performs life-saving surgery on a basset hound hit by a car; a cat with plenty of attitude needs Dr. Amy to treat his mysterious wound.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.desc: Greg and Lucas make clients Aaron and Karen a dinosaur-themed enclosure for a new reptile they're introducing into their growing family; with Jason and Chris' guidance, animal lover Kate picks out an affectionate blue Tegu that melts her heart.

programme.desc: Greg and Lucas create a Jurassic-themed enclosure for a blue-tongued skink; Tyrone and Chris construct a versatile enclosure for a reptile rescue that will house a Ball python, Gecko, Bearded dragon, and Uromastyx.

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: When an out-of-state hunter appears to lie about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate; conservation officers work with volunteers to recover the body of missing hiker on Mount Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: Officers Adam Cheney and Geoff Pushee run into an aggressive and angry hunter while investigating a road hunting complaint; an elderly man with dementia goes missing in the swamp.

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: A stolen ATV steers Parker through a maze of suspects; Carter races to a domestic violence dispute; Marquis and Fitzpatrick set up a sting for a suspected night hunter.

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: Angry hunters raise their voices and attitudes with Warden Lounder over an illegal deer; 90-year-old local helps MacCabe catch a baiter; a full-scale manhunt seeks a missing hunter with Parkinson's disease.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: Maine's final week of deer season gets out of control with desperate hunters; Warden Robertson takes on a felon with an illegal gun; Warden Carter tracks down rowdy teen hunters terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: Fair chase - hunting without bait - is the law in Maine; Sergeant Simmons and Warden McKenney hunt down brothers allegedly baiting wildlife and hunting at night; Warden Carter tracks down a father who is teaching his son the wrong way to hunt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: North Woods Law
programme.desc: Warden Dudley helps an Amish family save their corn crop from a bear; Wardens Carter and McBrine hunt for a man hiding out in a cabin.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Wardens must be cautious as they release a trapped black bear back into the wild; they pull together all their resources to stop illegal hunting in the valley.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Discovering the lives of conservation officers of Montana defending public lands, handling anti-poaching sting operations and more.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Wardens uncover a crime scene while others patrol summer crowds, issuing fines for littering and DUI; amidst the chaos, Captain Jeff Darrah retires after 26 years, leaving a legacy of dedication and bravery.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: After a tip-off, wardens investigate poaching in dense forests and rugged terrains; other wardens monitor salmon snagging, ensuring fair play and dodging grizzly bears; tensions rise as enforcement meets nature's challenges.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: Region four wardens navigate conflicting stories from locals, while region six wardens catch trespassers; ranchers help uncover illegal deer shootings, revealing a wildlife mystery as tensions rise.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A barrage of heavy gunfire in an archery-only area puts wildlife agents on high alert; two boaters are stranded on Catahoula Lake; a hunter is caught in an act of fraud; a veteran agent encounters a high-stakes violation on his final patrol.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When a child is thrown from a boat and badly injured, wildlife agents are first on the scene; a night hunter faces multiple felony charges when agents make a grave discovery, agents confront a jet ski rider who risks drowning and gets belligerent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Wildlife agents interrogate a felon caught hunting with a firearm; witnesses report a hunter trying to bludgeon a swimming deer from his boat; a duck shot out of season leads agents to a slew of violations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When wildlife agents find an alligator with a fresh bullet wound to the head, nearby anglers are the prime suspects; an injured hunter must be evacuated by helicopter; agents use drones to track crabbers selling their catch across state lines.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A stray dog arrives at RAPS in rough shape and the team uncovers his surprising story; William, a street-wise cat, amazes Dr. Maldonado with his resilience; Odin, a German Eurasier, heads into surgery; Karen is handed a huge picking challenge.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: A black cat with breathing problems gives the vets a run for their money; Bucky, a senior Labrador, takes a frightening turn during surgery; Lucy the Hedgehog surprises her owner with undetected health issues.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the reopening of the zoo; Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul makes a bid that could bring the Gator Boys back to Everglades Holiday Park; a photo shoot involving alligators takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul handles an emergency in Florida while the boys work nuisance calls along the Mississippi Gulf Coast; a giant alligator attacks Tre.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson must rescue two cats from their cycle of co-dependency before they're kicked out of their owner's house; Jackson is introduced to a couple who shelters four special need felines and a man who struggles with his frisky feline.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat Missy, who seems determined to kill their other cat Fluffy; a tortie named Candy beats up a 9-year-old because she isn't so sweet.
